title: Sentinel Shield installation plan
description: Deterministic, read-only description of the operations an install-baseline.sh / sync-baseline.sh dry-run WOULD perform, emitted with --emit-install-plan. It is a plan, not a result: no files are written when it is produced. Key order is deterministic (fixed object key order; the operations array is sorted by target) so two dry-runs of the same profile against the same target produce byte-identical output. It carries NO secrets and NO file contents — only the profile, mode flags, and per-file (mode, action, source, target) tuples.

schema_version.description: Installation-plan schema version. Fixed at '1' for this contract.

profile.description: Profile whose manifest drives the plan.

mode.description: Reported profile mode for install-baseline (report-only|baseline|strict|regulated); "" (empty) for sync-baseline, which does not set a mode.

apply.description: Whether the plan describes an --apply run. A plan is emitted for dry-runs; this reflects the flag the plan was computed under.

force.description: Whether --force was set (managed files would be overwritten).

protected.description: Project-local paths that are NEVER written (accepted-risks.json, phpstan-baseline.neon, manifest never_touch), sorted.

operations.description: Per-file planned operations, sorted deterministically by target.

mode.description: Manifest file mode governing how the file is managed.

action.description: What the dry-run determined it would do for this file given the current target state and flags.

source.description: Source path within the Sentinel Shield repo.

target.description: Destination path within the consuming project (relative).
